headinthecloudstrivia:DY0r3MChxnJ.title: Trivia Night at DeLuxe Bar & Grill
headinthecloudstrivia:DY0r3MChxnJ.description: Free weekly Head in the Clouds trivia at DeLuxe Bar & Grill on Capitol Hill, Mondays at 7:30pm. Free to play with prizes.

headinthecloudstrivia:DYGHalHAfKO.title: Heated Rivalry Trivia 2: The Reheat
headinthecloudstrivia:DYGHalHAfKO.location: Old Stove Brewing - Ship Canal, Seattle, WA
headinthecloudstrivia:DYGHalHAfKO.description: Hockey/Heated Rivalry book-series themed trivia night at Old Stove Brewing Ship Canal. Doors 6:30pm, trivia at 7pm. Ticketed, $30 per table (6 players max).
